Architecture: alpha amd64 arm64 armel armhf hppa i386 loong64 m68k powerpc ppc64 ppc64el riscv64 s390x sh4 sparc64 x32 all
Build-Depends: dpkg-dev (>= 1.22.5), debhelper (>= 14.0), debhelper-compat (= 14), dh-sequence-bash-completion, dh-sequence-python3, asciidoc, intltool, liblua5.4-dev, libssl-dev, libsystemd-dev, pkgconf, python3-all-dev, systemd-dev (>= 255~rc3-3), xsltproc, docbook-xsl
Description: IP geolocation query library libloc is a lightweight library to query the IPFire Location database and determine the location of someone else on the Internet based on their IP address.
Package-List: libloc-dev deb libdevel optional arch=alpha,amd64,arm64,armel,armhf,hppa,i386,loong64,m68k,powerpc,ppc64,ppc64el,riscv64,s390x,sh4,sparc64,x32 libloc1t64 deb libs optional arch=alpha,amd64,arm64,armel,armhf,hppa,i386,loong64,m68k,powerpc,ppc64,ppc64el,riscv64,s390x,sh4,sparc64,x32 location deb net optional arch=all lua-location deb libs optional arch=alpha,amd64,arm64,armel,armhf,hppa,i386,loong64,m68k,powerpc,ppc64,ppc64el,riscv64,s390x,sh4,sparc64,x32 python3-location deb python optional arch=alpha,amd64,arm64,armel,armhf,hppa,i386,loong64,m68k,powerpc,ppc64,ppc64el,riscv64,s390x,sh4,sparc64,x32
